user_description.ru: Ты водишь льдом по его телу. Грудь, живот, член. Он вздрагивает от холода.
user_description.en: You run ice on his body. Chest, belly, cock. He shivers from cold.

image_prompt: woman holding ice cube against man's chest, water droplets on skin, man lying on bed
